positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a collection of whimsical woodland animals (fox, deer, owl, bunny) gathered around a stylized campfire under a crescent moon. The aesthetic is modern kawaii fairy tale meets sophisticated mid-century illustration. Use clean, thick lines and flat vector color blocking with a limited palette of forest greens, deep navy blue, burnt orange, and cream. The characters should have noticeable silhouettes and simple, charming expressions. The background should be abstract watercolor washes of twilight blue and lavender, ensuring maximum contrast for the central subjects. Perfect for a central t-shirt print, isolated on a clean background.
negative: blurry, grainy, noise, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, low detail, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, muted colors, low contrast, 3d render, photo-realistic
